name: time-mission-website
description: Static marketing website for Time Mission.

scripts.check: npm run compile:routes && npm run test:unit && npm run check:locations && npm run check:sitemap && npm run check:components && npm run check:booking && npm run check:a11y && npm run check:links && npm run check:routes && npm run check:site-data && npm run check:location-routes && npm run check:fallback && npm run check:component-usage && npm run check:site-contract && npm run check:analytics && npm run check:consent && npm run check:seo-catalog && npm run check:seo-robots
scripts.build:astro: node scripts/sync-static-to-public.mjs && astro build && node scripts/minify-dist-assets.mjs && node scripts/inject-csp-hashes.mjs
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:astro && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.verify:phase1: npm run verify && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist
scripts.verify:phase2: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist
scripts.verify:phase3: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist
scripts.verify:phase4: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:routes -- --dist && npm run check:ticket-panel-parity && npm run check:ticket-panel-source-parity
scripts.verify:phase5: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:routes -- --dist && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:ticket-panel-parity && npm run check:ticket-panel-source-parity && npm run test:smoke
scripts.verify:phase6: npm run check && npm run build:astro && npm run check:routes -- --dist && npm run check:astro-dist && npm run check:ticket-panel-parity && npm run check:ticket-panel-source-parity && npm run test:smoke
